data.title: GREEN: Implement --min-children and --max-children flags in sprint-list-epics.sh
data.description:
## Summary
Add --min-children=N and --max-children=N flags to sprint-list-epics.sh. Replace the single-flag parse (line 26) with an argument loop. Use ${var+x} set-check (not truthiness) for the 0-value edge case. Pass filter values as env vars to the Python classification section. Filter after classification, before output.

## Implementation Details
- Argument loop: iterate over "$@", match --all, --min-children=*, --max-children=*
- Set-check pattern: [ "${min_children+x}" ] (not [ -n "$min_children" ] which treats 0 as unset)
- Pass SPRINT_MIN_CHILDREN and SPRINT_MAX_CHILDREN env vars to Python
- In Python: read from os.environ, filter in_progress/open_unblocked/open_blocked lists
- No flags = existing behavior unchanged (backward compatible)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — all 38 existing + 5 new tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] --min-children=1 excludes 0-child epics
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh && bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_min_children_filters.*PASS'
- [ ] --max-children=0 shows only 0-child epics (0 not treated as unset)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh && bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_max_children_zero_set_check.*PASS'
- [ ] No flags = existing behavior (backward compatible)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh && bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_min_children_backward_compat.*PASS'
- [ ] bash -n passes (no syntax errors)
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh
